title: General Media Recipes: WA, PDA, LB, CMA, V8
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fgflg","text":"These are current general media recipes for (acidified) water agar, (acidified) potato dextrose agar, LB broth, cornmeal agar, and clarified V8 juice agar.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7epn","text":"Prepare the following:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"67a4v","text":"Turn on water bath if making more than 3-4 bottles of poured media, or if making P5ARP/P10ARP. Set to  . ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":68,"length":2},{"style":"sub","offset":82,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":88,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":102,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"9ussl","text":"Prepare hood by spraying surfaces with ethanol and allowing hood to equalize for   minutes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":81,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"ddhuf","text":"Open the necessary quantity of Petri plate bags and stack in hood (500 mL agar =~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates, 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1clga","text":"Standardize pH meter, if applicable (aWA and aPDA).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d9kda","text":"Thaw any antibiotics, if applicable.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"error_temperature":false,"guid":"9D3E025D143511EEA01B0A58A9FEAC02","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"temperature":"50","unit":10}},"1":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":900,"error_temperature":false,"guid":"9D3E02D2143511EEA01B0A58A9FEAC02","id":0,"label":"","pause":null,"preset":[],"scientificNotation":false,"start":null,"temperature":"50","unit":10}}}}
steps: Select media types from below:
Autoclave liquid setting for 20 minutes to sterilize.
Add stir bar and stir contents well. Place a loose orange cap. Label cap with autoclave tape (1.5% WA) and date.
Water Agar preparation: A B C 1 500 mL 250 mL 2 Bottle size (mL) 1000 500 3 Agar (g) 7.5 3.75 4 RO Water (mL) 500 250 500 mL ~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates or 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates.

To make 1/4 strength PDA: A B C D 1 500 mL 250 mL Full Strength 2 Bottle size (mL) 1000 500 see label 3 Difco© potato dextrose (g) 6 3 see label 4 Agar (g) 7.5 3.75 see label 5 RO Water (mL) 500 250 see label 500 mL ~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates or 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates.
Add stir bar and stir contents well. Place a loose orange cap. Label cap with autoclave tape (1/4 PDA or aPDA), and date.
Autoclave liquid setting for 20 minutes to sterilize.
To make acidified WA (aWA): Adjust to pH 3.9 after autoclaving with 10 % (v/v) lactic acid ~0.5 mL for 500 mL of media
To make acidified PDA (aPDA): Adjust to pH 3.9 after autoclaving with 10 % (v/v) lactic acid ~0.5 mL for 500 mL of media

To make LB Agar: A B C 1 500 mL 250 mL 2 Bottle size (mL) 1000 500 3 Difco© LB broth (g) 20 10 4 Agar (g) 10 5 5 RO Water (mL) 500 250 500 mL ~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates or 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates.
Add stir bar and stir contents well. Place a loose orange cap. Label cap with autoclave tape (LB), and date.
Autoclave liquid setting for 20 minutes to sterilize.

To prepare Cornmeal Agar (CMA) for Pythium: A B C 1 500 mL 250 mL 2 Bottle size (mL) 1000 500 3 Cornmeal Agar (g) 8.5 4.25 4 RO Water (mL) 500 250 500 mL ~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates or 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates.
Add stir bar and stir contents well. Place a loose orange cap. Label cap with autoclave tape (CMA), and date.
Autoclave liquid setting for 20 minutes to sterilize.
When media has solidified, place in bags labeled with media name, your initials, and date.

For V8 Juice Clarified Agar: A B C 1 1000 mL 500 mL 2 Bottle size (mL) 1000 500 3 Clarified V8 Vegetable Juice (mL) 200 100 4 Calcium carbonate (CaCO3) (g) 2 1 5 Agar (g) 15 7.5 6 RO Water (mL) 800 400 500 mL ~ 1.5 sleeves of 90 mm plates or 2 sleeves of 60 mm plates. Calcium carbonate is reported to prevent the acidity of the juice from hydrolyzing the agar. Some report no issues with solidification without CaCO 3 .
Place a loose cap. Label cap with autoclave tape (V8 Juice), and date.
Autoclave liquid setting for 20 minutes to sterilize.
Empty V8 juice can into 250 mL flask, add calcium carbonate and small stir bar. Stir thoroughly at room temperature for 00:10:00 .
Set water bath to 50 °C to 55 °C .
Prep pH station by standardizing probe. See protocol at pH bench. Adjust to pH 7.2 ± 0.2. Continue to agitate medium during dispensing to keep particulates suspended.
Place in water bath and cool to 55 °C .
When media has solidified, place in bags labeled with media name, your initials, and date.
When media has solidified, place in bags labeled with media name, your initials, and date.

Mark plates with media color codes. Bennett Lab media color codes. Turn off water bath. Turn off autoclave, if no longer needed. Spray inside of hood with ethanol. Close filling port in pH meter, if necessary. Tightly cap empty media bottles so agar doesn’t dry out.
When media has solidified, place in bags labeled with media name, your initials, and date.

Mark plates with media color codes. Bennett Lab media color codes. Turn off water bath. Turn off autoclave, if no longer needed. Spray inside of hood with ethanol. Close filling port in pH meter, if necessary. Tightly cap empty media bottles so agar doesn’t dry out.

Mark plates with media color codes. Bennett Lab media color codes. Turn off water bath. Turn off autoclave, if no longer needed. Spray inside of hood with ethanol. Close filling port in pH meter, if necessary. Tightly cap empty media bottles so agar doesn’t dry out.

Mark plates with media color codes. Bennett Lab media color codes. Turn off water bath. Turn off autoclave, if no longer needed. Spray inside of hood with ethanol. Close filling port in pH meter, if necessary. Tightly cap empty media bottles so agar doesn’t dry out.

Mark plates with media color codes. Bennett Lab media color codes. Turn off water bath. Turn off autoclave, if no longer needed. Spray inside of hood with 80% ethanol. Close filling port in pH meter, if necessary. Tightly cap empty media bottles so agar doesn’t dry out.
Pipette needed supernatant into autoclavable media bottle. Add agar. Bring to 0.5-1 L with RO water.

Pipette 15 mL into Oakridge centrifuge tube with screw cap lid. For viewing morphological features, completely clarify juice by centrifugation at 13200 rpm, °C, 30 minutes ; or for clearer juice, centrifuge at 2860 rcf, °C, 5 minutes
creator: Nimalka Weerasuriya
